creator: freebsd@omarpolo.com
text:
Created attachment 231734
update to 1.8.1

Hello,

I just tagged 1.8.1.  The changelog is available here:

https://git.omarpolo.com/gmid/tag/?h=1.8.1

The security issue fixed is linux-only and doesn't affect FreeBSD (or any other system really) in the slightest.  There were however some improvements and typos fixed that are a good excuse to update the package anyway.

Thanks!

Omar Polo
